modules.name: 微速引擎 V3.0 (顶部横向极简版)
modules.code:
(function(){const SPEED_CONFIG={multiplier:1.0,accumulator:0.0};const SPEED_TIERS=[1.0,1.05,1.10,1.15,1.20,1.25,1.30,1.40,1.50,1.75,2.0,3.0,4.0,5.0];function getSmoothOffset(mult){if(mult>=5.0)return 14;if(mult>=4.0)return 16;if(mult>=3.0)return 18;if(mult>=2.0)return 20;return 25}(function createSpeedPanel(){if(document.getElementById('ghost-speed-panel-v3'))document.getElementById('ghost-speed-panel-v3').remove();const panel=document.createElement('div');panel.id='ghost-speed-panel-v3';panel.style.cssText='position:absolute;top:5px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background-color:rgba(0,0,0,0.4);padding:5px 10px;border-radius:4px;z-index:999999;display:flex;flex-direction:row;align-items:center;gap:8px;user-select:none;border:1px solid #444;';const header=document.createElement('div');header.innerHTML='
⚡
';panel.appendChild(header);const btnContainer=document.createElement('div');btnContainer.id='speed-btns';btnContainer.style.cssText='display:flex;flex-direction:row;gap:4px;';panel.appendChild(btnContainer);SPEED_TIERS.forEach((tier)=>{const btn=document.createElement('button');btn.innerText=tier.toFixed(2);btn.style.cssText='background:transparent;color:#aaa;border:1px solid transparent;padding:2px 4px;border-radius:3px;cursor:pointer;outline:none;font-family:monospace;font-size:10px;text-align:center;transition:all 0.1s;';btn.onclick=function(){SPEED_CONFIG.multiplier=tier;SPEED_CONFIG.accumulator=0.0;Array.from(btnContainer.children).forEach(b=>{b.style.background='transparent';b.style.color='#aaa';b.style.borderColor='transparent';b.style.fontWeight='normal'});btn.style.background='rgba(230, 57, 70, 0.8)';btn.style.color='#fff';btn.style.borderColor='#ff7b00';btn.style.fontWeight='bold'};btnContainer.appendChild(btn)});document.body.appendChild(panel);btnContainer.children[0].click()})();if(!window._ghostOriginalPomeloNotify){window._ghostOriginalPomeloNotify=window.pomelo.notify}window.pomelo.notify=function(route,msg){if(route==="area.playerHandler.sendAction"&&msg&&msg.input){if(msg.input.type===1){if(SPEED_CONFIG.multiplier<=1.0){SPEED_CONFIG.accumulator=0;return window._ghostOriginalPomeloNotify.apply(this,arguments)}SPEED_CONFIG.accumulator+=(SPEED_CONFIG.multiplier-1.0);if(SPEED_CONFIG.accumulator>=1.0){let baseFrameId=msg.frameId;let baseTs=msg.input.ts||Date.now();let extraPackets=Math.floor(SPEED_CONFIG.accumulator);let currentOffset=getSmoothOffset(SPEED_CONFIG.multiplier);for(let i=1;i<=extraPackets;i++){let fakePacket=JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(msg));fakePacket.frameId=baseFrameId+(i-1);fakePacket.input.ts=baseTs-(extraPackets-i+1)*currentOffset;window._ghostOriginalPomeloNotify.call(this,route,fakePacket)}msg.frameId=baseFrameId+extraPackets;msg.input.ts=baseTs;SPEED_CONFIG.accumulator-=extraPackets}}}return window._ghostOriginalPomeloNotify.apply(this,arguments)};if(window._ghostKeyHandler)document.removeEventListener('keydown',window._ghostKeyHandler);window._ghostKeyHandler=function(e){if(!e.isTrusted||e.target.tagName==='INPUT'||e.target.tagName==='TEXTAREA')return;if(e.keyCode===187||e.keyCode===107||e.keyCode===189||e.keyCode===109){let currentTier=SPEED_CONFIG.multiplier;let index=SPEED_TIERS.findIndex(t=>Math.abs(t-currentTier)<0.01);if(index===-1)index=0;if(e.keyCode===187||e.keyCode===107){if(index0){const btnContainer=document.getElementById('speed-btns');if(index>0)document.getElementById('speed-btns').children[index-1].click()}}}};document.addEventListener('keydown',window._ghostKeyHandler);console.clear();console.log("%c✔️ [防封加速引擎 V3.0 极简终极版] 注入成功！ 👉 面板已最小化至顶部居中，数字直选，丝毫不挡视野。 👉 支持高倍速 (3x, 4x, 5x) 。 👉 战斗中请随时按键盘的 『 + 』 / 『 - 』 键无缝调节节奏！","color: #00BFFF; font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold;")})()
